## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Nick Tippmann (TipTop VC) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital/GrowthX) to discuss potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel shared his entrepreneurial background and the journey that led to founding GrowthX, an AI-powered content marketing agency](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Nick discussed his experience at Greenlight Guru and his new venture capital fund TipTop focused on vertical SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [They explored ways GrowthX could support TipTop's portfolio companies with content marketing and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Potential partnership structures were discussed, including discounts, referral fees, and Marcel becoming a small LP in TipTop's fund](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)

## Topics

### Nick's Background

  - [Studied entrepreneurship and marketing at Indiana University](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Had early startups and worked at accelerators out of college](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Co-founded a media company focused on startups outside Silicon Valley](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Was part of the founding team and CMO at Greenlight Guru (quality/regulatory compliance SaaS for med device industry)](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Recently left Greenlight Guru to start TipTop VC, a $15M pre-seed/seed fund focused on vertical SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Marcel's Journey

  - [Originally from Brazil, moved to US at 11, studied at UT Austin](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Started doing web design and Google Ads in college to pay expenses](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Built contributor content platforms at IBM (SecurityIntelligence.com) and HP (TechBeacon.com)](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Joined HashiCorp as Head of Brand/Digital Growth, then took over Go-To-Market systems](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Moved to ServiceTitan (challenging cultural fit) and then Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Founded GrowthX recently, an AI-powered content marketing agency hitting $1M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### GrowthX and AI Content Marketing

  - [Uses AI workflows to create high-quality content at 10 cents/word](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Leverages human expertise throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Focuses on SEO, uncovering untapped keyword opportunities for clients](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Provides full-service packages as well as lighter strategy/audit offerings](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Aims to help clients achieve outcomes with minimal effort through AI automation](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)

### Potential Collaboration with TipTop Portfolio

  - [Nick very interested in plugging GrowthX into TipTop's portfolio for content/SEO](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Discussed discount structures, referral fees, Marcel potentially becoming a small LP](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Top candidates: Project Mark, Boost My School, Portfolio Pilot, GCAI](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
  - [Marcel to provide DeepGram credits to TipTop portfolio via startup program](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=3704.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Nick on Slack for continued conversations](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=3833.0)
  - [Explore partnership structure that aligns incentives (discounts, referrals, LP)](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Connect Marcel with TipTop portfolio companies starting with Project Mark and Boost My School](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=3211.0)
  - [Marcel to fast-track DeepGram startup program credits for TipTop companies](https://fathom.video/share/2d95FRU58khb8kMWn43vMju_r4Sp4V5D?tab=summary&timestamp=3712.0)
